violations.description: Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Need to keep handwash sink from being blocked.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Single serve trays on the floor.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Handwash sink was blocked at the beginning of the inspection.
